rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VERLIS BROWN SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Rodney Smith's Motion for Award of Attorney Fees is continued to 1/9/2014 at 2:30 p.m. so that it may be heard after the trial on the underlying petition. The Administrator is directed to ascertain whether Lionel Taylor and Kenneth Taylor are additional heirs who should receive notice of these proceedings and of this motion. Any party who wishes to contest this tentative and argue the motion must notify the court (415-551-3702) and all other parties no later than 5:00 p.m. on 6/4/2013.
